title: Boat Rental in Lake Atitlan: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Choosing the right boat in Lake Atitlan depends on your budget and group size, with half-day motorboat hire starting around 150 EUR. Whether you depart from Panajachel or San Pedro, BoatHire24 lets you compare verified options to hire a boat that suits your plans.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Lake Atitlan?

Prices range from 40 EUR for a shared tour to over 800 EUR for a fully crewed yacht for the day. Typical rates include 150-250 EUR for a small motorboat for half a day and 400-600 EUR for a catamaran full-day. All listings on BoatHire24 already include local taxes. You can hire a boat in a few minutes.

  • Shared tour (ferry between villages): from 40 EUR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): from 150 EUR
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): from 400 EUR
  • Crewed private yacht full-day (up to 10 guests): from 700 EUR

Where to set off in Lake Atitlan?

Most boat trips start from the main public docks at Panajachel, San Pedro, San Marcos, or Santiago Atitlán. These towns have well-established piers and a range of boat rental operators. Private launches also depart from smaller communities such as Santa Cruz La Laguna and Jaibalito. For longer crossings, a typical journey from Panajachel to Santiago Atitlán covers about 12 nautical miles across the lake. One option worth a look is this motor yacht.

Which boat to rent for your trip?

The best boat for you depends on group size, budget, and whether you want a guided tour or independent skippered trip. Here are the most common options available on BoatHire24:

  1. Small motorboat (4-6 guests), ideal for village hopping or sunset trips; from 150 EUR half-day. Compare models like the Axopar or smaller RIBs.
  2. Skippered catamaran (8-12 guests), roomy for groups wanting a leisurely day with swimming stops; from 400 EUR full-day. Many are Lagoon or Fountaine Pajot models.
  3. Private yacht with crew (6-10 guests), full-service experience including lunch and drinks; from 700 EUR full-day. For a premium example, see this motor yacht on the platform.
  4. Shared water taxi (up to 12 guests), the cheapest way to travel between villages; from 40 EUR per person per leg.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Lake Atitlan?

No, you do not need a boating licence to charter a boat with a skipper. All private rentals on BoatHire24 include a qualified captain who knows the lake’s conditions and local regulations. The operator will confirm exact licence requirements if you book a bareboat (self-drive) option, but these are rare on Atitlan due to variable winds such as the Xocomil, which picks up in the afternoon. If you own a boat, you can list a boat for free and earn from spare days.

Rent a boat with a local skipper: they know the best secluded coves and can navigate the afternoon Xocomil wind with ease, making your trip safer and more enjoyable.

When is the best season to rent a boat?

High season runs from November to April, when the weather is driest and the lake is calmest. May to October sees more rain and stronger afternoon winds, but trips remain possible with careful timing. Booking in 2026 is straightforward: the platform shows up-to-date availability.

At a glance

  • Price range: 40, 800+ EUR per trip
  • Peak months: November to April
  • Trip length: 1-hour shuttle to full-day charter
  • Capacity: 4, 12 guests on private boats
  • Currency: EUR (local quotes often in GTQ, listed in EUR on BoatHire24)

Questions about boat rental in Lake Atitlan

Can I rent a boat in Lake Atitlan without a skipper?

Most hire boats come with a skipper included; bareboat hire is rarely offered by local operators.

How early should I book a boat for high season?

Booking at least two weeks ahead in November to April ensures you secure your preferred vessel and departure time.

Are meals included on a catamaran trip?

Many full-day catamaran charters include lunch, snacks, and drinks; check the boat listing for details.

What is the maximum group size for a private yacht?

Private yachts typically accommodate up to 10 guests, though larger catamarans can take 12.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Lake Atitlan or list your own. If you own a boat in this stunning volcanic lake, consider joining the platform to list a boat for free and reach travellers from around the world.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Lake Atitlan and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
